summary: Frontend end-to-end testing complete for Hot&Tasty food shop. Tested 19 critical flows across home page, menu, cart, checkout (COD + Stripe online), admin login, admin orders status update, admin menu CRUD, About/OrderInfo/Footer sections, and /cancel page. ALL TESTS PASSED.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby` for {DialogContent}. Minor a11y warning from Radix Dialog. Not user-visible.

tests_executed.hero_render: PASS - 'Hot. Fresh. Delivered.' headline, 5.0 rating, Order Now/View Menu CTAs visible
tests_executed.hero_scroll_to_menu: PASS - both Order Now and View Menu scroll to #menu
tests_executed.filter_momos: PASS - 6 momo items, pill bg=rgb(255,107,53) (#FF6B35 orange) with data-active=true
tests_executed.add_to_cart: PASS - badge increments correctly, sonner toast appears
tests_executed.cart_drawer_open: PASS - shows items with image/name/variant, subtotal, delivery fee, total
tests_executed.checkout_cod: PASS - dialog closes, cart clears, success toast appears, order created
tests_executed.about_section: PASS - 5.0 badge, story mentions Adhyatmik Nagar, Dine-in/Drive-through/Delivery services visible
tests_executed.order_info_section: PASS - 8 AM-10 PM timings, Adhyatmik Nagar location, 084483 27336 phone, embedded Google Map iframe (data-testid=map-container)
tests_executed.footer: PASS - brand, quick links, social icons, '© 2025 Hot And Tasty Food Shop' copyright
tests_executed.cancel_page: PASS - /cancel renders 'Payment Cancelled' heading + Back to Menu button
tests_executed.admin_login: PASS - 'wrongpass' shows 'Wrong password' toast; admin123 navigates to dashboard
tests_executed.admin_orders_status_update: PASS - clicking status pill (e.g., status-{id}-preparing) updates order; pill shows data-active=true
tests_executed.admin_add_delete_menu: PASS - new item created and visible; delete via del-{id} works (cleaned via API after test)

action_items: OPTIONAL (low priority): Add aria-describedby or DialogDescription on CheckoutDialog to silence Radix a11y console warning. Already partially done — DialogDescription is present, but the warning still fires. Not blocking.
critical_code_review_comments: CartDrawer Sheet may also be missing SheetDescription causing one of the Radix warnings.
Admin password hardcoded check is fine for MVP, but no rate-limiting is present on /api/admin/login.
lib/api.js does not handle non-2xx errors gracefully aside from default axios throws — checkout uses err.response.data.detail which is good.
All interactive elements have data-testid coverage — excellent testability.
seed_data_creation: Created 1 test order (COD + 1 online Stripe session — Stripe test mode, not completed) and 1 menu item TEST_TestDish_QA (deleted after test via API).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend is fully working. Stripe redirect verified to checkout.stripe.com sandbox. The minor Radix Dialog aria warning is non-blocking. Backend already passed 17/17 in prev iteration.
